name: videocut
description: 执行视频剪辑。根据确认的删除任务执行FFmpeg剪辑，循环直到零口误，生成字幕。触发词：执行剪辑、开始剪、确认剪辑
capabilities: Transcribe video files using FunASR with character-level timestamps
Detect speech errors including repetitions, false starts, and incomplete sentences
Identify filler words and hesitation sounds in Chinese speech
Detect silence segments longer than 1 second with precise timing
Generate review documents with timestamp-driven deletion tasks
Process videos in 30-second segments to avoid timestamp drift
author: Ceeon
securitySummary: This skill contains documentation with code examples for video transcription using FFmpeg and FunASR Python library. Static scanner detected 114 potential issues but these are false positives. All detected patterns are example code snippets within markdown documentation files showing how to use external tools. The skill itself contains no executable code, only instructional documentation for Claude Code to follow. The external commands shown are legitimate video processing commands. No malicious intent detected.
valueStatement: Content creators struggle with manual video editing to remove speech errors, filler words, and awkward pauses. This skill automates video transcription and identifies all editable issues with precise timestamps for quick cleanup.
userTitle: Transcribe and Edit Chinese Speaking Videos
limitations: Requires FFmpeg and FunASR Python library to be installed locally
Optimized for Chinese language content only
Cannot automatically edit videos, only identifies issues for review
Requires manual confirmation before deletion tasks are executed

useCases.title: Video Course Creator Cleanup
useCases.description: Educational content creators can transcribe lecture videos and automatically identify all speech errors, filler words, and awkward pauses for efficient post-production editing.

useCases.title: Podcast Post-Production
useCases.description: Podcast producers can process interview recordings to find all the ums, ahs, and false starts that need editing, saving hours of manual review time.

useCases.title: YouTube Content Optimization
useCases.description: YouTubers can improve video quality by removing all detected speech imperfections, creating more polished final content with precise edit lists.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Video Transcription
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me transcribe this video file and identify speech errors
promptTemplates.scenario: Starting a new video editing project

promptTemplates.title: Process Speaking Video
promptTemplates.prompt: Process this speaking video and generate a review document

promptTemplates.title: Identify All Issues
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this video for speech errors, filler words, and silence

promptTemplates.title: Custom Segment Processing
promptTemplates.prompt: Transcribe this 5-minute video segment and show me all the filler words with timestamps
promptTemplates.scenario: Detailed analysis of specific video sections

bestPractices: Always review the generated deletion task list before executing edits
Use 30-second segment processing for videos longer than 5 minutes
Check the review document context around filler words before deletion
antiPatterns: Do not skip reading the methodology files before processing videos
Avoid processing entire long videos without segmentation
Do not delete items without reviewing the surrounding context first

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: Any video format that FFmpeg can process, including MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV files. The skill extracts audio for transcription.

faq.question: Does this skill work with English videos?
faq.answer: No, this skill is optimized specifically for Chinese language content. The speech error detection patterns and filler word lists are designed for Mandarin Chinese.

faq.question: Will this automatically edit my video?
faq.answer: No, this skill only identifies issues and generates a deletion task list. You must review and confirm the changes before executing any video edits.

faq.question: How accurate is the speech error detection?
faq.answer: The skill uses FunASR for transcription and applies rule-based detection for errors. Accuracy depends on audio quality and speaking clarity. Always review the generated list.

faq.question: What are the system requirements?
faq.answer: You need FFmpeg installed for audio extraction and the FunASR Python library with required models (approximately 2GB download on first use).

faq.question: Can I adjust the silence detection threshold?
faq.answer: Yes, the default threshold is 1 second, but you can request different sensitivity levels when processing videos.
